mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.patrol_id, c.patrol_name, r.success, r.response_code, r.response_time, r.response_body, r.error_message, r.ai_report, r.create_time FROM api_patrol_result r LEFT JOIN api_patrol_config c ON r.patrol_id = c.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.patrol_id, c.patrol_name, r.success, r.response_code, r.response_time, r.response_body, r.error_message, r.ai_report, r.create_time FROM api_patrol_result r LEFT JOIN api_patrol_config c ON r.patrol_id = c.id WHERE r.patrol_id = #{patrolId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
